subject: fix(ui): move empty state guide buttons off canvas to below it
body:
The "Browse Presets" and "Upload Images" buttons were rendering as an
absolute overlay on top of the canvas, which covered the design surface
and could interfere with cell selection. Moved them to render as a
normal-flow element below the canvas container, keeping the same
navigation functionality intact.

Tags: ui, canvas, empty-state
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: canvas-controls
